title: Australian Defence Force members – income and work-related deductions
description: Australian Defence Force (ADF) members guide to income, allowances and claiming deductions for work-related expenses.
keywords: ADF, defence, defence force, military, army, navy, defense, ADF members, ADF tax, defence allowances, army reserve, australian army, adf slalry, adf tax guide, soliders

child_links.title: Who this guide applies to
child_links.description: Find out if this guide applies to you.

child_links.title: Income and allowances
child_links.description: Income and allowance amounts you need to include in your tax return and amounts you don’t include.

child_links.title: Deductions for work expenses
child_links.description: Deductions you can and can't claim for expenses you incur to earn your income.

child_links.title: Record keeping for work expenses
child_links.description: To claim a deduction, you need to get and keep records to prove you incurred the cost of the expenses.
